organization.name: ACSA Community Services
organization.description: Newcomer Supports; Child, Youth, and Family Supports; Housing Access and Supports and Homelessness Prevention; Emergency Food Access.  By appointment only.
organization.address: 911 Kennedy Rd, Unit 105, Toronto, ON, M1P 2L9, Canada

requirements.eligibility: Available to anyone in need of food support

requirements.accessibility_info: Designated parking at entrance ; Wheelchair accessible automatic main entrance; Easy access to elevator; Barrier-free washroom including door and stall.
